results.name: perfect match: all riders and teams matched, on the startlist, safe to apply
unmatched rider: unknown bib and name blocks safe-to-apply
startlist validation: a real matched rider (bib 3) removed from stage 2's startlist blocks safe-to-apply
startlist validation: no startlist rows found blocks safe-to-apply
ambiguous rider: bib 901 matches two real seeded riders
duplicate bib conflict: two parsed rows share a bib number
unmatched team: real rider, unrecognized team name
missing stage: stage 999 has no grandtour_stages record
TTT stage 4 is never safe to apply, even when rider matching and startlist validation both pass cleanly

sampleReportMetadata.note: Reconciliation-only dry run comparing official-letour parsed rows against existing Supabase GrandTour records. No Supabase writes occur; apply mode is not implemented.
